result.stdout:
Description:
  typewriter-cli — standalone Typewriter code generator

Usage:
  Typewriter.Cli [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  generate <templates>  Generate TypeScript files from .tst templates

commands.payload:
Description:
  typewriter-cli — standalone Typewriter code generator

Usage:
  Typewriter.Cli [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  generate <templates>  Generate TypeScript files from .tst templates

result.stdout:
Description:
  Generate TypeScript files from .tst templates

Usage:
  Typewriter.Cli generate <templates>... [options]

Arguments:
  <templates>  One or more glob patterns for template files (.tst)

Options:
  --solution <solution>            Path to the .sln, .slnx, or project file
  --project <project>              Path to a specific .csproj to scope the run
  --framework <framework>          Target framework moniker (TFM) to select
  --configuration <configuration>  MSBuild configuration (e.g. Debug, Release)
  --runtime <runtime>              Runtime identifier (RID) for restore/build
  --restore                        Run dotnet restore before loading
  --output <output>                Override default output directory for generated files
  --verbosity <verbosity>          Diagnostic verbosity: quiet|minimal|normal|detailed|diagnostic
  --fail-on-warnings               Exit with code 1 when warnings are emitted
  --dry-run                        Validate the pipeline without writing output files
  -?, -h, --help                   Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Generate TypeScript files from .tst templates

Usage:
  Typewriter.Cli generate <templates>... [options]

Arguments:
  <templates>  One or more glob patterns for template files (.tst)

Options:
  --solution <solution>            Path to the .sln, .slnx, or project file
  --project <project>              Path to a specific .csproj to scope the run
  --framework <framework>          Target framework moniker (TFM) to select
  --configuration <configuration>  MSBuild configuration (e.g. Debug, Release)
  --runtime <runtime>              Runtime identifier (RID) for restore/build
  --restore                        Run dotnet restore before loading
  --output <output>                Override default output directory for generated files
  --verbosity <verbosity>          Diagnostic verbosity: quiet|minimal|normal|detailed|diagnostic
  --fail-on-warnings               Exit with code 1 when warnings are emitted
  --dry-run                        Validate the pipeline without writing output files
  -?, -h, --help                   Show help and usage information
